productName: Stingers Sweets Melted Melon .5g 2pk - Melted Melon - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Melon Gum flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of lavender, flowery, and tropical, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
